Uses of Interface
common.binary.BinaryOutput

  • Packages that use BinaryOutput 
    Package Description
    common.binary  
    jpg
    Classes for parsing and manipulating JPEG-based files are found here.
    webp  

    • Uses of BinaryOutput in common.binary

      Classes in common.binary that implement BinaryOutput 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  RandomAccessWriter
      Provides a seekable binary stream writer backed by RandomAccessFile.

    • Uses of BinaryOutput in jpg

      Methods in jpg with parameters of type BinaryOutput 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      private static void JpgDatePatcher.processExifSegment(BinaryInput reader, BinaryOutput writer, int length, java.time.ZonedDateTime zdt)
      Patches the ASCII date tags and binary GPS time-stamp rationals if they are present within an EXIF segment.
      private static void JpgDatePatcher.processXmpSegment(BinaryInput reader, BinaryOutput writer, int length, java.time.ZonedDateTime zdt)
      Scans the XMP XML content for date-related tags and overwrites their values.

    • Uses of BinaryOutput in webp

      Methods in webp with parameters of type BinaryOutput 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      private static void WebPDatePatcher.processExifSegment(RiffHandler handler, BinaryOutput writer, java.time.ZonedDateTime zdt)
      Surgically patches date tags within the eXIf chunk by parsing the embedded TIFF structure.
      private static void WebPDatePatcher.processXmpSegment(RiffHandler handler, BinaryOutput writer, java.time.ZonedDateTime zdt, boolean xmpDump)
      Scans XML content within WebP 'XMP ' chunks for date tags and performs binary overwrites.
